
show me preview of the apk
Bash Check release APK directory and current version
IN
ls ~/CarbonWmsRelease/ 2>/dev/null && cat mobile/carbon_wms/pubspec.yaml | grep "^version:"

OUT
CarbonWMS V0.1.11+27.apk
CarbonWMS V1.1.1.apk
version: 1.1.1+28
[rerun: b1]
Bash List APK files with sizes and dump APK manifest info
IN
ls -lh ~/CarbonWmsRelease/ && echo "---" && aapt dump badging ~/CarbonWmsRelease/"CarbonWMS V1.1.1.apk" 2>/dev/null | head -40

OUT
total 175M
-rw-rw-r-- 1 carbondev carbondev 88M Apr 10 20:27 CarbonWMS V0.1.11+27.apk
-rw-rw-r-- 1 carbondev carbondev 88M Apr 10 22:19 CarbonWMS V1.1.1.apk
---
[rerun: b2]
Bash Find aapt tool location
IN
export PATH="/home/carbondev/development/flutter/bin:$PATH" && which aapt || find /home/carbondev/.tools /home/carbondev/Android /home/carbondev/development -name "aapt" 2>/dev/null | head -5

OUT
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/build-tools/34.0.0/aapt
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/build-tools/28.0.3/aapt
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/build-tools/35.0.0/aapt
[rerun: b3]
Bash Dump APK manifest info using aapt
IN
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/build-tools/35.0.0/aapt dump badging ~/CarbonWmsRelease/"CarbonWMS V1.1.1.apk" 2>&1 | head -60

OUT
package: name='com.shopcarbon.wms' versionCode='1' versionName='1.1.1' platformBuildVersionName='16' platformBuildVersionCode='36' compileSdkVersion='36' compileSdkVersionCodename='16'
sdkVersion:'29'
targetSdkVersion:'36'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.INTERNET'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.USE_BIOMETRIC'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.BLUETOOTH' maxSdkVersion='30'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.BLUETOOTH_ADMIN' maxSdkVersion='30'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION' maxSdkVersion='30'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN'

uses-permission: name='android.permission.USE_FINGERPRINT'
uses-permission: name='com.shopcarbon.wms.DYNAMIC_RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED_PERMISSION'
uses-permission: name='android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE'
application-label:'CarbonWMS'
application-label-af:'CarbonWMS'

application-label-ja:'CarbonWMS'
[rerun: b4]
Bash Get key APK info fields
IN
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/build-tools/35.0.0/aapt dump badging ~/CarbonWmsRelease/"CarbonWMS V1.1.1.apk" 2>&1 | grep -E "^(package|sdkVersion|targetSdkVersion|application-label:|application-icon|launchable|native-code|feature|densities)" | head -30

OUT
package: name='com.shopcarbon.wms' versionCode='1' versionName='1.1.1' platformBuildVersionName='16' platformBuildVersionCode='36' compileSdkVersion='36' compileSdkVersionCodename='16'
sdkVersion:'29'
targetSdkVersion:'36'
application-label:'CarbonWMS'
application-icon-120:'res/BW.xml'
application-icon-160:'res/BW.xml'
application-icon-240:'res/BW.xml'
application-icon-320:'res/BW.xml'
application-icon-480:'res/BW.xml'
application-icon-640:'res/BW.xml'
application-icon-65534:'res/BW.xml'
launchable-activity: name='com.shopcarbon.wms.MainActivity'  label='' icon=''
feature-group: label=''
densities: '120' '160' '240' '320' '480' '640' '65534'
native-code: 'arm64-v8a' 'armeabi-v7a' 'x86_64'
[rerun: b5]
Here's the APK preview for the latest build:

File: ~/CarbonWmsRelease/CarbonWMS V1.1.1.apk
Size: 88 MB
Built: Apr 10, 22:19

Package Info

Field	Value
Package	com.shopcarbon.wms
Version Name	1.1.1
Version Code	1
Min SDK	29 (Android 10)
Target SDK	36 (Android 16)
Compiled SDK	36
Architectures: arm64-v8a, armeabi-v7a, x86_64

Permissions:

INTERNET
USE_BIOMETRIC / USE_FINGERPRINT
CAMERA
BLUETOOTH, BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, BLUETOOTH_SCAN
ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION
ACCESS_WIFI_STATE, ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE
READ_PHONE_STATE
REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES
READ/WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
Note: The current pubspec.yaml version is 1.1.1+28 but the APK's versionCode is 1. This is because the build number (+28) maps to versionCode — a mismatch worth checking. The previous APK V0.1.11+27.apk had +27, so it seems the release build may not be passing --build-number correctly.

show me in the emculator
Bash Check connected devices and emulators
IN
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices

OUT
List of devices attached
[rerun: b1]
No emulator is running. Let me check what AVDs are available.

Bash List available Android Virtual Devices
IN
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -list-avds 2>/dev/null

OUT
galaxy_s25_ultra
[rerun: b2]
Found galaxy_s25_ultra. Let me check the start-emulator script and then launch it.

Read start-emulator.sh
The script uses noVNC for browser access. I'll start the emulator stack, then install the release APK. This will be viewable at http://localhost:6080/vnc.html.

Bash Start virtual display, VNC, and noVNC
IN
pkill -f "Xvfb :99" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "x11vnc.*5999" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "websockify.*6080" 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1
Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1440x3120x24 &
sleep 1
x11vnc -display :99 -nopw -listen localhost -xkb -ncache 10 -ncache_cr -quiet -rfbport 5999 &
sleep 1
websockify --web /usr/share/novnc/ 6080 localhost:5999 &
sleep 1
echo "VNC stack started"

OUT
Exit code 144
[rerun: b3]
Bash Kill existing VNC processes
IN
pkill -f "Xvfb :99" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "x11vnc.*5999" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "websockify.*6080" 2>/dev/null; echo "killed"

OUT
Exit code 144
[rerun: b4]
Bash Start Xvfb virtual display
IN
Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1440x3120x24 &
echo "xvfb pid: $!"

OUT
xvfb pid: 4919
[rerun: b5]
Bash Start x11vnc VNC server
IN
sleep 1 && x11vnc -display :99 -nopw -listen localhost -xkb -ncache 10 -ncache_cr -quiet -rfbport 5999 &
echo "x11vnc pid: $!"

OUT
x11vnc pid: 4926
[rerun: b6]
Bash Start noVNC websockify
IN
sleep 1 && websockify --web /usr/share/novnc/ 6080 localhost:5999 &
echo "websockify pid: $!"

OUT
websockify pid: 4932
[rerun: b7]
Bash Start Android emulator in background
IN
DISPLAY=:99 /home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator \
  -avd galaxy_s25_ultra \
  -no-audio \
  -gpu swiftshader_indirect \
  -no-snapshot-save &
echo "emulator pid: $!"

OUT
emulator pid: 4938
[rerun: b8]
Bash Wait for emulator to fully boot
IN
echo "Waiting for emulator to boot..."
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb wait-for-device
until /home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | grep -q "1"; do
  sleep 3
  echo "still booting..."
done
echo "Emulator ready!"

OUT
Waiting for emulator to boot...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
still booting...
Emulator ready!
[rerun: b9]
Emulator is booted. Now installing the release APK:

Bash Install release APK on emulator
IN
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb install -r ~/CarbonWmsRelease/"CarbonWMS V1.1.1.apk"

OUT
Command running in background with ID: boahv4ugu. Output is being written to: /tmp/claude-1000/-home-carbondev-dev-carbon-warehouse-management/6b1d448f-f2ef-42b2-ac03-b43e34d75f37/tasks/boahv4ugu.output
[rerun: b10]
You can view the emulator right now at:

http://localhost:6080/vnc.html

The APK is installing in the background. Once done, I'll launch the app automatically.

Read boahv4ugu.output
TaskOutput task: "boahv4ugu"
OUT
<retrieval_status>success</retrieval_status>

<task_id>boahv4ugu</task_id>

<task_type>local_bash</task_type>

<status>completed</status>

<exit_code>0</exit_code>

<output>
Performing Streamed Install
Success
</output>
APK installed successfully. Now launching it:

Bash Launch CarbonWMS app on emulator
IN
/home/carbondev/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb shell am start -n com.shopcarbon.wms/.MainActivity

OUT
Starting: Intent { cmp=com.shopcarbon.wms/.MainActivity }
[rerun: b11]
App is launched. Open http://localhost:6080/vnc.html in your browser to see it running on the emulator.
